description: Business and operational metrics for NAV Copilot ecosystem (mcp-onboarding, mcp-registry, my-copilot)

targets.expr: sum by (container) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", container!="", container!="POD"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (container) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", resource="cpu", container!=""})

title: Copilot Ecosystem
